title: work-at Android Expo Surface
description: Fast task-surface health profile for Android Expo work on a worker surface.

checks.title: Registered Android repo path is a git checkout
Registered Android repo has an origin remote
checks.repairHint: Restore the repo origin remote before using this Android worker surface for fetch, pull, or push work.

checks.title: Registered Android repo can read from origin
checks.repairHint: Repair GitHub remote auth on this Android worker so `git fetch` and `git ls-remote origin` succeed before continuing. Do not transfer patches across workers when this check is red.

checks.title: Java is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install or expose Java on the Android worker before running Expo Android build flows.

checks.title: ADB is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install or expose adb on the Android worker before using Android device flows.

checks.title: agent-device is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install `agent-device` as a first-class CLI on the Android worker before asking the agent to use device automation there.

checks.title: npx is available on target
checks.repairHint: Expose `npx` on the Android worker before using Expo fallback CLI flows.

checks.title: apps/expo-app exists on target
checks.repairHint: Use the correct Android Expo checkout or recreate the missing `apps/expo-app` workspace before continuing.

checks.title: ADB sees at least one device on target
checks.repairHint: Connect or boot an Android emulator/device on the worker before using device automation or `expo run:android`.
